expected.clarification: Ask whether Central Stockroom or Warehouse C should be used as the warehouse for “Safety Label Roll.”
response_constraints: Ask one concise question that names the two offered locations: Central Stockroom and Warehouse C.
Do not retrieve the saved preference, invent a third choice, create anything, or claim the request is complete.

prompt: Please create the inventory item “Safety Label Roll” for 2026-10-26. It could be assigned to Central Stockroom or Warehouse C, and I have not chosen between them. The warehouse matters, so do not guess or use my saved default.
